name: Chinese Almond Cookies #2
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour with baking soda and baking powder.
2. Beat egg and lard together.
3. Add sugars and almond extract to the mixture.
4. Gradually mix in dry ingredients until well blended.
5. Roll 1 tablespoon of dough into a ball for each cookie.
6. Place each cookie on an ungreased baking sheet.
7. Press 1 almond into the middle of each cookie.
8. Brush with beaten egg yolk.
9. Bake at 350°F for 15 to 20 minutes.
